user.title: TMDB API Configuration
user.description: Enter your TMDB API key and select your country for Netflix catalog browsing. Get a free API key at themoviedb.org.

apple_tv.title: Apple TV (Optional)
apple_tv.description: Optionally select a media player entity for Netflix playback. You can skip this step.

error.invalid_api_key: Invalid TMDB API key. Please check and try again.
error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to TMDB. Check your network connection.
